title: Penny of Top Hill Trail
writer: Finis Fox, Belle K. Maniates, Beatrice Van
actors: Bessie Love, Wheeler Oakman, Raymond Cannon
plot: Penny arrives by airplane in the neighborhood of the Kingdon ranch. Her behavior is thought suspicious, and she is put in jail, where Kurt Walters, foreman of the ranch and deputy sheriff, recognizes her as a girl his friend Jo me...
